## Summary

What changed and why?

## Evidence

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Updated documentation when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Checked examples against current CLI output

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm pack`

## Notes for reviewers

Call out heuristics, assumptions, or compatibility risks.
